title: Decision Making Flowchart for Hypothesis Testing Significance Levels
description: A flowchart illustrating the process of choosing and applying a significance level (alpha) in a hypothesis test, leading to the acceptance or rejection of the null hypothesis.
relationships: Flow from 'State Null Hypothesis' to 'Choose Significance Level'
'Choose Significance Level' and 'Calculate p-value' both feed into 'Compare p-value to α'
If p-value ≤ α, flow to 'Reject H₀'
If p-value > α, flow to 'Fail to Reject H₀'
